name: Speaker / Soundbar – Sound Wave Stack Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sp-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="sp-bar-hot" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT"/>
      <stop offset="50%"  stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_MID"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_RIGHT"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="sp-cta" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1080" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_RIGHT"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="sp-img-glow" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT" stop-opacity="0.15"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="sp-img-clip">
      <rect x="428" y="0" width="224" height="1350"/>
    </clipPath>
    <clipPath id="sp-canvas">
      <rect width="1080" height="1350"/>
    </clipPath>
    <mask id="sp-bar-mask">
      <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="white"/>
      <rect x="428" y="0" width="224" height="1350" fill="black"/>
    </mask>
  </defs>

  <g clip-path="url(#sp-canvas)">

  <!-- LAYER 1: black background -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#sp-bg)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: sound wave bar stack (masked — centre strip cut out) -->
  <g mask="url(#sp-bar-mask)" opacity="0.85">
    <rect x="0" y="48"   width="1080" height="6"  rx="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT" fill-opacity="0.9"/>
    <rect x="0" y="74"   width="1080" height="14" rx="3" fill="url(#sp-bar-hot)" fill-opacity="0.7"/>
    <rect x="0" y="110"  width="1080" height="8"  rx="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_MID"  fill-opacity="0.5"/>
    <rect x="0" y="136"  width="1080" height="22" rx="3" fill="url(#sp-bar-hot)" fill-opacity="0.8"/>
    <rect x="0" y="178"  width="1080" height="6"  rx="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_RIGHT" fill-opacity="0.4"/>
    <rect x="0" y="202"  width="1080" height="32" rx="3" fill="url(#sp-bar-hot)" fill-opacity="0.9"/>
    <rect x="0" y="254"  width="1080" height="10" rx="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT" fill-opacity="0.5"/>
    <rect x="0" y="284"  width="1080" height="44" rx="3" fill="url(#sp-bar-hot)" fill-opacity="0.85"/>
    <rect x="0" y="350"  width="1080" height="8"  rx="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_MID"  fill-opacity="0.4"/>
    <rect x="0" y="378"  width="1080" height="56" rx="3" fill="url(#sp-bar-hot)" fill-opacity="0.9"/>
    <rect x="0" y="456"  width="1080" height="12" rx="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_RIGHT" fill-opacity="0.5"/>
    <rect x="0" y="490"  width="1080" height="72" rx="3" fill="url(#sp-bar-hot)" fill-opacity="0.95"/>
    <rect x="0" y="584"  width="1080" height="14" rx="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT" fill-opacity="0.5"/>
    <rect x="0" y="620"  width="1080" height="88" rx="3" fill="url(#sp-bar-hot)" fill-opacity="1"/>
    <rect x="0" y="732"  width="1080" height="14" rx="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_MID"  fill-opacity="0.5"/>
    <rect x="0" y="768"  width="1080" height="72" rx="3" fill="url(#sp-bar-hot)" fill-opacity="0.95"/>
    <rect x="0" y="864"  width="1080" height="10" rx="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_RIGHT" fill-opacity="0.4"/>
    <rect x="0" y="896"  width="1080" height="52" rx="3" fill="url(#sp-bar-hot)" fill-opacity="0.85"/>
    <rect x="0" y="970"  width="1080" height="8"  rx="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT" fill-opacity="0.45"/>
    <rect x="0" y="998"  width="1080" height="36" rx="3" fill="url(#sp-bar-hot)" fill-opacity="0.7"/>
    <rect x="0" y="1054" width="1080" height="8"  rx="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_MID"  fill-opacity="0.4"/>
    <rect x="0" y="1080" width="1080" height="22" rx="3" fill="url(#sp-bar-hot)" fill-opacity="0.6"/>
  </g>

  <!-- LAYER 3: product image — tall narrow centre strip -->
  <g clip-path="url(#sp-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="428" y="0" width="224" height="1350" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="428" y="0" width="224" height="1350" fill="url(#sp-img-glow)"/>
  <rect x="428" y="0" width="224" height="1350" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 4: full-width ticker top -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1080" height="38" fill="url(#sp-cta)" fill-opacity="0.12"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="38" x2="1080" y2="38" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.3"/>
  <text x="30"   y="26" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="500" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="6">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>
  <text x="540"  y="26" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT" fill-opacity="0.8" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_URL_TICKER</text>
  <text x="1050" y="26" text-anchor="end"    font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="500" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="6">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_LOCATION</text>

  <!-- LAYER 5: left typography -->
  <text x="390" y="220"  text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="52" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_LEFT_LINE1</text>
  <text x="390" y="310"  text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="52" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_LEFT_LINE2</text>
  <text x="390" y="400"  text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="52" font-weight="100" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_LEFT_LINE3</text>
  <text x="390" y="486"  text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="52" font-weight="100" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_LEFT_LINE4</text>
  <line x1="390" y1="200" x2="390" y2="980" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.2"/>

  <text x="390" y="560" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="10" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_LSPEC1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="390" y="588" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_LSPEC1_VALUE</text>
  <text x="390" y="646" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="10" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_LSPEC2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="390" y="674" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_LSPEC2_VALUE</text>
  <text x="390" y="730" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="10" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_LEFT" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_LSPEC3_LABEL</text>
  <text x="390" y="758" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_LSPEC3_VALUE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 6: right typography -->
  <text x="692" y="220"  font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="52" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_RIGHT_LINE1</text>
  <text x="692" y="310"  font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="52" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_RIGHT_LINE2</text>
  <text x="692" y="400"  font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="52" font-weight="100" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_RIGHT_LINE3</text>
  <text x="692" y="486"  font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="52" font-weight="100" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_RIGHT_LINE4</text>
  <line x1="692" y1="200" x2="692" y2="980" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_RIGHT" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.2"/>

  <text x="692" y="560" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="10" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_RIGHT" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_RSPEC1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="692" y="588" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_RSPEC1_VALUE</text>
  <text x="692" y="646" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="10" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_RIGHT" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_RSPEC2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="692" y="674" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_RSPEC2_VALUE</text>
  <text x="692" y="730" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="10" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WAVE_RIGHT" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_RSPEC3_LABEL</text>
  <text x="692" y="758" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_RSPEC3_VALUE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 7: price cutout band -->
  <rect x="0" y="1108" width="1080" height="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="1108" x2="1080" y2="1108" stroke="url(#sp-cta)" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.8"/>

  <text x="54" y="1178" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_LABEL</text>
  <text x="54" y="1270" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="90" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-4">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>
  <text x="54" y="1296" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.25" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_SUB</text>

  <!-- LAYER 8: CTA gradient pill -->
  <rect x="680" y="1140" width="360" height="88" rx="44" fill="url(#sp-cta)"/>
  <text x="860" y="1194" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>
  <text x="860" y="1220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.65" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_CONTACT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 9: footer -->
  <line x1="0" y1="1310" x2="1080" y2="1310" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.06"/>
  <text x="540" y="1334" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.18" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_TEXT</text>

  </g>
</svg>
